title: bumelia parviflora
intro: Bumelia parviflora, also known as the smallflower bumelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bumelia parviflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including infections and digestive problems.
